mechanics: POTION STORAGE: when full, excess potions auto-SELL for Fame ('Potion Storage full. Potion of Wisdom sold for N fame!'). 'old dusty bottle' opens into a Potion. 'Item Crate'/'receipt' identification opens into items. Event spawns seen: Mysterious Card, Asgard Guardian, Mad Jester (defeated 7/25 — Galactic counter).
uncertain: Some taunt tails cut off ('I will...', 'My demonic...', 'you release a...'). Boss->dungeon mapping: Malphas=Abyss, Septavius=Undead Lair, Mad God=Oryx (these merge to those dungeons on rebuild).
confidence: HIGH — recovered FULL taunt sets for Archdemon Malphas + Septavius the Ghost God + an Oryx Mad God line, all verbatim; plus the Potion-Storage->Fame mechanic. Major taunt haul.
